_comment: 20 benchmark queries alternating French/English, spanning every message type. `text` is both the pipeline input and the script synthesised to a test audio file for the STT round-trip. `intent` is the objective label graded automatically; `expects` is the human-grading hint for answer correctness (the polisher rephrases, so final-answer accuracy is verified by hand). Items sharing a `thread` run in order so follow-ups inherit context.

queries.text: Hi there, good to meet you.
queries.expects: Friendly greeting; identifies itself as the Djezzy Voice Assistant; no SQL.

queries.text: Salam, comment vas-tu aujourd'hui ?
queries.expects: Réponse amicale en français; se présente comme l'assistant vocal Djezzy; pas de SQL.

queries.text: What kind of questions can I ask you?
queries.expects: Describes its analytics capabilities (KPIs, wilayas, charts, email, reports).

queries.text: C'est quoi exactement l'ARPU ?
queries.expects: Définition de l'ARPU (revenu moyen par utilisateur) en français; pas de SQL.

queries.text: What does the churn rate mean?
queries.expects: Definition of churn rate (share of subscribers who left); no SQL.

queries.text: Montre-moi la marge brute pour Oran le trimestre dernier.
queries.expects: One gross-margin figure for Oran, spoken as a clean percentage.

queries.text: What was the total revenue in Setif last month?
queries.expects: One total-revenue figure for Sétif, rounded with a scale word (e.g. million DZD).

queries.text: Compare le revenu net entre Alger et Oran.
queries.expects: Two net-income figures, one per wilaya, with which leads; rounded.

queries.text: Which wilaya had the lowest postpaid churn rate in Q4 2025?
queries.expects: A single wilaya name + its churn rate as a percentage.

queries.text: Trace la tendance du revenu net pour Tlemcen sur 2025.
queries.expects: A line chart over 2025 for Tlemcen + a short spoken summary; chart file produced.

queries.text: Plot the prepaid ARPU trend for Annaba over 2025.
queries.expects: A line chart of prepaid ARPU for Annaba across 2025; chart file produced.

queries.text: Envoie le détail de l'ARPU prépayé par wilaya au directeur financier.
queries.expects: Data computed + an email draft addressed to the finance director (not sent).

queries.text: Email the postpaid churn by wilaya to the operations manager.
queries.expects: Data computed + an email draft to the operations manager (not sent).

queries.text: Mets le revenu total par wilaya dans un rapport.
queries.expects: Revenue-by-wilaya computed + a report document written to disk.

queries.text: Put the OPEX breakdown for this year into a report.
queries.expects: OPEX breakdown computed + a report document written to disk.

queries.text: Quel est le score de satisfaction réseau pour Béjaïa ?
queries.expects: States this metric is not in the database; suggests available KPIs. No SQL.

queries.text: What is the company's stock price today?
queries.expects: States stock price is out of scope; lists what it can answer.

queries.text: How many postpaid subscribers migrated in Bejaia last month?
queries.expects: Migration figure for Bejaia (postpaid); sets up the follow-up below.

queries.text: Et pour Tiaret ?
queries.expects: Inherits migration_rate + period from b18, swaps wilaya to Tiaret.

queries.text: Top 5 wilayas by total revenue this year.
queries.expects: Five wilayas ranked by total revenue, each figure rounded with a scale word.
